assignments.title: Gr. 6 Science — Climate Workbook
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: Climate unit workbook covering greenhouse effect, fossil fuels, renewable energy, and climate solutions

rubric.name: Knowledge & Understanding
rubric.description: Demonstrates accurate knowledge of climate concepts, greenhouse effect, and fossil fuels

rubric.name: Application & Analysis
rubric.description: Applies concepts to real-world climate situations and explains cause-effect relationships

rubric.name: Communication
rubric.description: Uses scientific vocabulary correctly and communicates ideas clearly in writing

rubric.name: Diagrams / Visuals
rubric.description: Diagrams are accurate, fully labelled, and support understanding

assignments.title: Gr. 6 Science — Energy Resources Workbook
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: Energy resources unit covering renewable and non-renewable energy, energy transfer, and conservation

rubric.name: Knowledge & Understanding
rubric.description: Demonstrates accurate knowledge of energy types, sources, and transformations

rubric.name: Application & Analysis
rubric.description: Applies energy concepts to evaluate resources and explain energy chains

rubric.name: Communication
rubric.description: Uses scientific vocabulary correctly and explains ideas clearly

rubric.name: Diagrams / Visuals
rubric.description: Energy diagrams and flow charts are accurate and labelled

assignments.title: Gr. 6 Science — Forces Workbook
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: Forces unit covering contact and non-contact forces, friction, gravity, and simple machines

rubric.name: Knowledge & Understanding
rubric.description: Demonstrates accurate knowledge of force types, Newton's laws basics, and simple machines

rubric.name: Application & Analysis
rubric.description: Applies force concepts to explain everyday situations and predict outcomes

rubric.name: Communication
rubric.description: Uses scientific vocabulary correctly and explains reasoning clearly

rubric.name: Diagrams / Visuals
rubric.description: Force diagrams show correct direction, magnitude notation, and labels

assignments.title: Gr. 6 Science — Living Systems Workbook
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: Living systems unit covering cells, organ systems, ecosystems, and biodiversity

rubric.name: Knowledge & Understanding
rubric.description: Demonstrates accurate knowledge of cell structures, organ systems, and ecosystem relationships

rubric.name: Application & Analysis
rubric.description: Applies biological concepts to explain how systems interact and maintain balance

rubric.name: Communication
rubric.description: Uses scientific vocabulary correctly and explains biological processes clearly

rubric.name: Diagrams / Visuals
rubric.description: Cell and system diagrams are accurate, labelled, and detailed

assignments.title: Gr. 6 Science — Matter Workbook
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: Matter unit covering states of matter, physical and chemical changes, atoms and molecules

rubric.name: Knowledge & Understanding
rubric.description: Demonstrates accurate knowledge of matter properties, states, and particle theory

rubric.name: Application & Analysis
rubric.description: Distinguishes physical vs chemical changes and explains matter transformations

rubric.name: Communication
rubric.description: Uses scientific vocabulary correctly and explains concepts clearly

rubric.name: Diagrams / Visuals
rubric.description: Particle diagrams for each state of matter are accurate and labelled

assignments.title: Gr. 6 Science — Space Workbook
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: Space unit covering the solar system, moon phases, seasons, and space exploration

rubric.name: Knowledge & Understanding
rubric.description: Demonstrates accurate knowledge of solar system structure, moon phases, and seasons

rubric.name: Application & Analysis
rubric.description: Explains planetary motion, eclipses, and seasonal changes using space concepts

rubric.name: Communication
rubric.description: Uses scientific vocabulary correctly and explains space phenomena clearly

rubric.name: Diagrams / Visuals
rubric.description: Solar system and moon phase diagrams are accurate, to scale where noted, and labelled

assignments.title: Gr. 7 Science — Heat & Temperature Workbook
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: Heat and temperature unit covering particle theory, heat transfer (conduction, convection, radiation), and thermal expansion

rubric.name: Knowledge & Understanding
rubric.description: Demonstrates accurate knowledge of heat transfer methods and particle theory of heat

rubric.name: Application & Analysis
rubric.description: Applies heat transfer concepts to explain everyday phenomena and thermal systems

rubric.name: Communication
rubric.description: Uses scientific vocabulary correctly and explains heat concepts clearly

rubric.name: Diagrams / Visuals
rubric.description: Heat transfer diagrams show direction of energy flow and are correctly labelled

assignments.title: Gr. 7 Science — Interactions & Ecosystems Workbook
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: Ecosystems unit covering food webs, biotic/abiotic factors, population dynamics, and human impact

rubric.name: Knowledge & Understanding
rubric.description: Demonstrates accurate knowledge of ecosystem relationships, food webs, and ecological roles

rubric.name: Application & Analysis
rubric.description: Analyses ecosystem changes and explains consequences of population shifts or human impact

rubric.name: Communication
rubric.description: Uses ecological vocabulary correctly and communicates complex relationships clearly

rubric.name: Diagrams / Visuals
rubric.description: Food webs and ecosystem diagrams are complete, correctly directional, and labelled

assignments.title: Gr. 7 Science — Planet Earth Workbook
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: Earth science unit covering plate tectonics, rock cycle, erosion, and Earth's layers

rubric.name: Knowledge & Understanding
rubric.description: Demonstrates accurate knowledge of Earth's structure, plate tectonics, and rock types

rubric.name: Application & Analysis
rubric.description: Applies Earth science concepts to explain geological events and landscape formation

rubric.name: Communication
rubric.description: Uses geological vocabulary correctly and explains Earth processes clearly

rubric.name: Diagrams / Visuals
rubric.description: Cross-section and tectonic diagrams are accurate, detailed, and labelled

assignments.title: Gr. 7 Science — Plants for Food & Fibre Workbook
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: Plants unit covering plant structures, photosynthesis, reproduction, and agricultural applications

rubric.name: Knowledge & Understanding
rubric.description: Demonstrates accurate knowledge of plant structures, photosynthesis, and reproduction

rubric.name: Application & Analysis
rubric.description: Applies plant biology to explain growth conditions, reproduction strategies, and agriculture

rubric.name: Communication
rubric.description: Uses botanical vocabulary correctly and explains plant processes clearly

rubric.name: Diagrams / Visuals
rubric.description: Plant structure and cell diagrams are accurate, detailed, and fully labelled

assignments.title: Gr. 7 Science — Structures & Forces Workbook
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: Structures unit covering load types, structural design, materials properties, and failure analysis

rubric.name: Knowledge & Understanding
rubric.description: Demonstrates accurate knowledge of load types, structural elements, and materials properties

rubric.name: Application & Analysis
rubric.description: Analyses structural designs, identifies weak points, and explains how forces are distributed

rubric.name: Communication
rubric.description: Uses engineering and science vocabulary correctly and explains structural concepts clearly

rubric.name: Diagrams / Visuals
rubric.description: Structural diagrams show force vectors, joints, and labelled components correctly

assignments.title: Math 9 — Algebra Workbook
assignments.subject: Math
assignments.description: Algebra unit covering polynomials, linear equations, and linear relations

rubric.name: Conceptual Understanding
rubric.description: Shows understanding of algebraic concepts, polynomial structure, and equation types

rubric.name: Procedural Accuracy
rubric.description: Carries out algebraic manipulations and equation solving correctly with minimal errors

rubric.name: Problem Solving
rubric.description: Selects appropriate strategies and applies them effectively to multi-step problems

rubric.name: Communication / Reasoning
rubric.description: Shows work clearly, explains reasoning, and uses correct mathematical notation

assignments.title: Math 9 — Measurement & Geometry Workbook
assignments.subject: Math
assignments.description: Measurement and geometry unit covering similarity, measurement, and circle geometry

rubric.name: Conceptual Understanding
rubric.description: Shows understanding of similarity, scale factors, and circle geometry theorems

rubric.name: Procedural Accuracy
rubric.description: Carries out geometric constructions and calculations correctly

rubric.name: Problem Solving
rubric.description: Applies geometric reasoning to solve multi-step measurement and geometry problems

rubric.name: Communication / Reasoning
rubric.description: Shows construction steps clearly, justifies geometric reasoning, uses correct notation

assignments._comment: ── CONCEPT QUIZZES — main progress markers, 16 pts each ──────────────

assignments.title: Gr. 6 Science — Climate Concept Quiz
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: 4-question concept quiz on the Climate unit — greenhouse effect, fossil fuels, renewable energy, and climate solutions

rubric.name: Q1
rubric.description: Defines or identifies a key climate concept (e.g. greenhouse effect, greenhouse gases)

rubric.name: Q2
rubric.description: Explains a climate process or cause-effect relationship (e.g. how CO₂ traps heat)

rubric.name: Q3
rubric.description: Applies climate concepts to a real-world situation or compares energy sources

rubric.name: Q4
rubric.description: Analyses a climate solution or evaluates its effectiveness using evidence

assignments.title: Gr. 6 Science — Energy Resources Concept Quiz
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: 4-question concept quiz on the Energy Resources unit — renewable/non-renewable, energy transfer, and conservation

rubric.name: Q1
rubric.description: Defines or identifies a key energy concept (e.g. renewable vs non-renewable, energy transformation)

rubric.name: Q2
rubric.description: Explains an energy transfer process or describes an energy chain

rubric.name: Q3
rubric.description: Applies energy concepts to evaluate or compare specific energy sources

rubric.name: Q4
rubric.description: Analyses an energy conservation strategy or evaluates trade-offs using evidence

assignments.title: Gr. 6 Science — Forces Concept Quiz
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: 4-question concept quiz on the Forces unit — contact/non-contact forces, friction, gravity, simple machines

rubric.name: Q1
rubric.description: Defines or identifies a force type or simple machine

rubric.name: Q2
rubric.description: Explains how a force acts on an object or describes the effect of friction/gravity

rubric.name: Q3
rubric.description: Applies force concepts to predict the motion or outcome of a situation

rubric.name: Q4
rubric.description: Draws and labels a force diagram or analyses how a simple machine changes force

assignments.title: Gr. 6 Science — Living Systems Concept Quiz
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: 4-question concept quiz on Living Systems — cells, organ systems, ecosystems, biodiversity

rubric.name: Q1
rubric.description: Identifies or defines a key biological structure (cell organelle, organ, or ecosystem component)

rubric.name: Q2
rubric.description: Explains the function of an organ system or describes how cells work together

rubric.name: Q3
rubric.description: Applies biological concepts to explain an ecosystem relationship or biodiversity role

rubric.name: Q4
rubric.description: Labels a cell or system diagram, or analyses how removing a species affects an ecosystem

assignments.title: Gr. 6 Science — Matter Concept Quiz
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: 4-question concept quiz on Matter — states of matter, physical/chemical changes, particle theory

rubric.name: Q1
rubric.description: Defines a matter concept or identifies the properties of a state of matter

rubric.name: Q2
rubric.description: Explains particle arrangement in each state or describes particle theory of matter

rubric.name: Q3
rubric.description: Classifies changes as physical or chemical and justifies the classification

rubric.name: Q4
rubric.description: Draws particle diagrams for states of matter or analyses a matter transformation

assignments.title: Gr. 6 Science — Space Concept Quiz
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: 4-question concept quiz on Space — solar system, moon phases, seasons, space exploration

rubric.name: Q1
rubric.description: Identifies a solar system body or explains a moon phase

rubric.name: Q2
rubric.description: Explains what causes seasons or describes Earth's movement around the Sun

rubric.name: Q3
rubric.description: Applies space concepts to explain an eclipse, tide, or planetary phenomenon

rubric.name: Q4
rubric.description: Labels a diagram of moon phases or the solar system, or evaluates a space exploration challenge

assignments.title: Gr. 7 Science — Heat & Temperature Concept Quiz
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: 4-question concept quiz on Heat & Temperature — particle theory, conduction, convection, radiation, thermal expansion

rubric.name: Q1
rubric.description: Defines heat, temperature, or thermal energy using particle theory

rubric.name: Q2
rubric.description: Explains one method of heat transfer (conduction, convection, or radiation) with an example

rubric.name: Q3
rubric.description: Applies heat transfer concepts to explain a real-world situation or design problem

rubric.name: Q4
rubric.description: Compares two heat transfer methods or draws a diagram showing direction of energy flow

assignments.title: Gr. 7 Science — Interactions & Ecosystems Concept Quiz
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: 4-question concept quiz on Interactions & Ecosystems — food webs, biotic/abiotic, population dynamics, human impact

rubric.name: Q1
rubric.description: Defines an ecological term (biotic, abiotic, producer, consumer, decomposer, etc.)

rubric.name: Q2
rubric.description: Explains a feeding relationship or describes energy flow through a food web

rubric.name: Q3
rubric.description: Predicts how a population change would affect other parts of an ecosystem

rubric.name: Q4
rubric.description: Draws or completes a food web, or analyses a human impact on an ecosystem

assignments.title: Gr. 7 Science — Planet Earth Concept Quiz
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: 4-question concept quiz on Planet Earth — plate tectonics, rock cycle, erosion, Earth's layers

rubric.name: Q1
rubric.description: Identifies a layer of Earth or a rock type and describes its characteristics

rubric.name: Q2
rubric.description: Explains a step in the rock cycle or describes how plate movement causes earthquakes/volcanoes

rubric.name: Q3
rubric.description: Applies plate tectonics to explain the formation of a specific landform or geological feature

rubric.name: Q4
rubric.description: Labels an Earth cross-section or rock cycle diagram, or analyses an erosion scenario

assignments.title: Gr. 7 Science — Plants for Food & Fibre Concept Quiz
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: 4-question concept quiz on Plants — structures, photosynthesis, reproduction, and agriculture

rubric.name: Q1
rubric.description: Identifies a plant structure and describes its function (root, stem, leaf, flower, etc.)

rubric.name: Q2
rubric.description: Explains the process of photosynthesis — inputs, outputs, and where it occurs

rubric.name: Q3
rubric.description: Compares sexual and asexual reproduction in plants, or explains pollination/seed dispersal

rubric.name: Q4
rubric.description: Labels a plant cell or flower diagram, or evaluates an agricultural practice using plant biology

assignments.title: Gr. 7 Science — Structures & Forces Concept Quiz
assignments.subject: Science
assignments.description: 4-question concept quiz on Structures & Forces — load types, structural design, materials, failure analysis

rubric.name: Q1
rubric.description: Defines a structural term or identifies a load type (compression, tension, shear, torsion)

rubric.name: Q2
rubric.description: Explains how a structural element (beam, arch, truss) distributes force

rubric.name: Q3
rubric.description: Applies structural concepts to explain why a design succeeded or failed

rubric.name: Q4
rubric.description: Draws a labelled structural diagram with force vectors, or evaluates a material choice
